status.bar.ready: Forge is ready to emit from this source.
doctor.title: Forge TypeLayer Doctor
prompt.gitignore: Forge TypeLayer uses '.vscode/forge-temp/' to build internally. Add it to .gitignore to avoid tracking artifacts?
error.binaryNotFound: Forge TypeLayer: No supported compiler ('bun', 'deno', or 'tsc') found in PATH. Aborting batch.
warn.zeroExtracted: ⚠️ Zero files extracted! Check shadow directory contents vs expected paths.
error.preflight.binary: Pre-flight validation failed for '{0}': Binary found but not executable or returned error.
error.preflight.filesystem: Pre-flight validation failed: Shadow directory '{0}' is not writable. Check permissions or volume mount.
config.warn.invalidSuffix: [Config] lockSuffixes: '{0}' is invalid — must start with '.' and end with '.ts' or '.mts'. Entry ignored.
config.warn.allInvalidSuffixes: [Config] lockSuffixes: all entries were invalid. Falling back to defaults.
info.activated: Forge TypeLayer Smart Engine activated. Ready to forge.
warn.outdatedBinary: Outdated binary detected for '{0}'. Version found: {1}, minimum recommended: {2}. You may experience stability issues.
prompt.strategy.title: Internal imports detected for {0}. How should we forge them?
